title: Wilds Harvest
description:
A food and Farming mod much like Pam's Harvest Craft in a Beta style

Made with the use of Nostalgia Tweaks in mind
body:
![Pumpkin Bread Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7c811d7986d47e2850fa5c540661f9c252caa9b_0.webp)
# Wilds Harvest
Is a mod trying to recreate mods like Pam's Harvest Craft in a Beta Minecraft style

This mod was made with the use of Nostalgia Tweaks and the Golden Days texture pack in mind
